subcodes.first_line: The Book from Us is unto him who hath attained unto the Most Great Ocean when it appeared amongst the nations with waves which none can deny save those who disbelieve [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن فاز بالبحر الاعظم اذ ظهر بین الامم بامواج لاینکرها الا الذین کفروا
